server.title: 🖥️ Server
backup.title: 💾 Current Backup
backup.empty_info: No backup yet. Create one directly here, via /backup create on the server, or enable the schedule below. Creating a new backup always overwrites the existing one.
upload.title: ⬆️ Upload & restore backup
upload.info:
Uploads a previously downloaded backup-*.json file and restores that exact state on {guildName}.
Warning, destructive: roles/channels/emojis/stickers that are missing from the backup will be deleted on this server. Anything present in both the backup AND the server (matched by name) is left untouched — only truly missing items are recreated. Bans are never removed automatically (no auto-unban).
transfer.title: 📤 Transfer to another server
transfer.info: Transfers the current backup of this server to another server the bot is also on. Same rule applies here: additive only, no existing data is deleted or overwritten.
include.title: 📦 Backup content (include / exclude)
include.hint: Applies to all future backups (command and schedule) for this server.
schedule.title: ⏰ Automatic backup (schedule)
schedule.enabled_label: Schedule active — the old backup is overwritten on every run
schedule.hint: Example: Monday, 09:00, Europe/Berlin = every Monday at 9am.
js.delete_confirm: Really delete the backup for this server?
js.select_file_first: Please select a backup-*.json file first.
js.restore_confirm:
Restore this backup to the server?

WARNING: roles/channels/emojis/stickers that are NOT in the backup will be DELETED. This cannot be undone. Bans are never removed automatically.
js.applying: ⏳ Applying backup — this can take several minutes on large servers…
js.transfer_confirm: Transfer this server's backup to "{target}"? Roles/channels/emojis/stickers/bans will be recreated there (existing ones are left untouched, duplicates possible).
js.transferring: ⏳ Transferring — this can take several minutes on large servers…
